function:
def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought 2: The ratio of weight Difference, the weight difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight, can be useful.
    Thought 3: The absolute value of the difference between Left-Distance and Right-Distance can capture the imbalance in distance distribution.
    Thought 4: The maximum difference in weights and distances, and left and right values will enhance the model performance.
    Thought 5: The standard deviation of left and right distances can capture the variability in distance distribution.
    Thought 6: The absolute value of the ratio of Left-Weight and Right-Distance can capture the relationship between weight and distance.
    
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    New Feature 2: weight_ratio | weight_ratio = weight_difference / Max(Left-Weight, Right-Weight)
    New Feature 3: distance_difference | distance_difference = abs(Left-Distance - Right-Distance)
    New Feature 4: max_difference | max_difference = max(abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight), abs(Left-Distance - Right-Distance), max(Left-Weight, Right-Weight) - min(Left-Weight, Right-Weight), max(Left-Distance, Right-Distance) - min(Left-Distance, Right-Distance))
    New Feature 5: std_left_distance | std_left_distance = std(Left-Distance)
    New Feature 6: weight_distance_ratio | weight_distance_ratio = abs(Left-Weight) / Max(Left-Distance, Right-Distance)
    New Feature 7: max_weight | max_weight = max(Left-Weight, Right-Weight)
    New Feature 8: max_distance | max_distance = max(Left-Distance, Right-Distance)
    """
    
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Calculate ratio of weight difference
    df_output['weight_ratio'] = df_output['weight_difference'] / df_output['Left-Weight'].abs()

    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Distance and Right-Distance
    df_output['distance_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
